title: F5 security advisory (AV26-273)
description: On March 24, 2026, F5 published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: NGINX Plus   versions R32 to R36
NGINX Open Source   versions 1.0.0 to 1.29.6 and 0.5.13 to 0.9.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
